item.title: News
item.description: Stay up to date on new cybersecurity solutions, as well as BI.ZONE news and events

item.title: Manufacturing and engineering leap ahead of finance as prime cyber targets
item.description: This makes them the most frequently attacked industries after the public sector

item.title: React2Shell: new critical vulnerability exploited against Russian companies
item.description: Attackers have attempted to distribute the XMRig cryptocurrency miner

item.title: OFFZONE 2026: dates and venue confirmed
item.description: The seventh international conference on practical cybersecurity OFFZONE will run on August 20–21 in Moscow's GOELRO

item.title: Vortex Werewolf spies impersonate Telegram
item.description: In the crosshairs are defense and government organizations

item.title: BI.ZONE EDR updated to version 1.39
item.description: The new version of BI.ZONE EDR offers greater usability for cybersecurity specialists and delivers faster incident analysis through improvements in the user interface, threat hunting capabilities, and response mechanisms in Linux and Windows environments.
